intro: Seaside Wellness is proud to call West Palm Beach home, a vibrant coastal destination where healing and renewal naturally align. Known for its year-round sunshine, palm-lined streets, and tranquil beaches, West Palm Beach provides the perfect backdrop for recovery. Here, clients experience the ideal blend of relaxation and professional care, surrounded by the calming energy of Florida's Atlantic coast. Whether you're seeking help for substance use or co-occurring mental health concerns, Seaside Wellness offers a safe, restorative environment designed to support lasting change.

sections.heading: Our Therapies & Clinical Approach

Our team combines evidence-based therapies with holistic practices to help clients rebuild balance in mind, body, and spirit. Every therapy is chosen to meet each client's needs, supporting long-term recovery and emotional resilience.
By blending modern clinical methods with holistic healing, our West Palm Beach team provides a balanced path toward lasting recovery and renewed well-being.
bullets: Individual Therapy: One-on-one sessions focused on personal growth and relapse prevention.
Group Therapy: Peer support and shared insight that strengthen accountability and connection.
Family Therapy: Rebuilding trust and communication with loved ones throughout recovery.
Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT): Identifying negative thought patterns and developing healthy coping strategies.
Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT): Enhancing mindfulness, distress tolerance, and emotional regulation.
Trauma-Informed Care: Creating safety and empowerment for those with trauma histories.
Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT): FDA-approved medications to safely manage cravings and withdrawal for opioid and alcohol use disorders.
Holistic Modalities: Incorporating mindfulness, meditation, and other restorative activities to nurture full-body wellness.

sections.heading: Get Help Today at Seaside Wellness in West Palm Beach
paragraphs: If you or someone you love is struggling with addiction or mental health challenges, help is only one call away. Seaside Wellness offers trusted, compassionate treatment right here in West Palm Beach. Our admissions team is available 24/7 to answer your questions, verify insurance, and guide you toward the level of care that fits your needs.

faqs.q: What treatment programs do you offer?
faqs.a: We offer medical detox, residential treatment for substance use disorder, mental health residential program, dual diagnosis care, aftercare planning, and access to virtual services for ongoing support.
Yes. We accept most major insurance plans and can quickly verify your benefits to help you understand coverage options. Call today at (855) 416-5648 for a quick and confidential verification.

Length of stay varies based on medical needs, substance history, and progress in treatment. Detox typically lasts 5–10 days, while residential treatment may range from 30 days to 90+ days depending on clinical recommendations. Each client is assessed regularly to determine the safest timeline for advancement.

faqs.q: Can family members be involved in treatment?
faqs.a: Yes. Family participation is strongly encouraged and can include family therapy sessions, communication guidance, and discharge planning education. Strengthening the family system is a key factor in maintaining recovery after leaving our West Palm Beach facility.

faqs.q: Do you treat co-occurring mental health conditions?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our dual diagnosis program treats conditions such as anxiety, depression, PTSD, and bipolar disorder alongside addiction. Treating both together improves symptom management, reduces relapse risk, and supports whole-person healing.

faqs.q: Is the facility private and safe?
faqs.a: Yes. Our environment is intentionally structured to ensure privacy, safety, clinical oversight, and comfort. Clients can focus on recovery without external pressures or exposure to triggering environments.

paragraphs: Seaside Wellness has earned the trust of South Florida residents and individuals traveling from across the country for its dedication to compassionate, effective treatment. Our coastal facility in West Palm Beach provides the perfect environment to disconnect from stress, focus on healing, and build a strong foundation for lasting recovery. Every aspect of care is guided by licensed professionals who understand the complexities of addiction and co-occurring mental health disorders. We offer a professional continuum of care, including medical detox, residential, and dual diagnosis support, so you or your loved ones can heal in a safe environment.
With expert support, a serene healing environment, and seamless access from anywhere in South Florida, Seaside Wellness is a leading choice for a lasting recovery.
bullets: Experienced clinical and medical team
Personalized treatment tailored to each client's goals
Peaceful coastal setting ideal for focused healing
Support for those traveling into South Florida for treatment
Family involvement and coordinated aftercare planning
Evidence-based and holistic therapy integration
Most major insurance plans approved

sections.heading: Take the First Step Toward Recovery
paragraphs: If you or someone you love is seeking addiction or mental health treatment in South Florida, Seaside Wellness is here to help. Our admissions team is available 24/7 to answer your questions, verify insurance benefits, assist with travel arrangements, and guide you into treatment quickly and confidentially. Call directly at (855) 416-5648 to speak with our admissions team.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients from across South Florida?
faqs.a: Yes. We welcome clients from across South Florida including Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Palm Beach County, and nearby coastal and inland communities. Our West Palm Beach facility is easily accessible from major highways and offers a peaceful environment for recovery close to home.

faqs.q: Can you help with travel arrangements for out-of-town clients?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our admissions specialists assist with travel planning, airport coordination, and local transport for clients arriving from outside West Palm Beach, including those flying in from across the country. Call (855) 416-5648 for more information.

faqs.q: What treatment programs do you provide on-site?
faqs.a: We provide detox, residential addiction treatment, and dual diagnosis support on-site. For continuing care, we help connect clients with virtual or in-network outpatient programs in our in-house network, ensuring seamless continuity of treatment.

faqs.q: Can family members be involved in treatment?
faqs.a: Yes. Family involvement is highly encouraged through therapy sessions and coordinated communication. Loved ones play a key role in long-term recovery success.
Yes. We work with most major Florida insurance plans, including PPO coverage, and our admissions team verifies benefits quickly to make treatment as accessible as possible.

faqs.q: Why is South Florida a good place for recovery?
faqs.a: South Florida's warm climate, coastal calm, and mental-health-focused community create an ideal environment for stabilizing early recovery. Clients experience professional care in a setting designed to reduce stress and support healing.

faqs.q: Do you provide aftercare and relapse-prevention support?
faqs.a: Yes. We create comprehensive aftercare and relapse-prevention plans including outpatient referrals, local resource coordination, and ongoing connection with recovery support services throughout South Florida.
